locality: Danzha Cun. In the vicinity of Zhaobitan forest farm, ca. 26.5 direct km NNW of Houqiao (Guyong).
recordedBy: Gaoligong Shan Biotic Survey Expedition - Summer 2006
fieldNotes: Shrub less than 1.5 m tall. Flowers whitish yellow. Forest dominated by Lithocarpus. Growing in forest in shade.

habitat: in white sand from conglomerate and sandstone
Along small stream on southern end of the mountain.
